name: hatenna
flavor_texts: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.
If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.
text: Hatenna is the Calm Pokémon. It is a psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: healer, anticipation, magic-bounce (hidden). Base stats — HP: 42, Attack: 30, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 56, Sp. Def: 53, Speed: 39. Evolution line: hatenna → hattrem → hatterene. Lore: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you. If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.
